utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: One pregnant woman at a time , please ! I just want you to be okay .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: So forcing her to marry Bobby is gonna make that happen ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Maybe ! Well ! Well ... so ... so uh , what kind of music does Numb Nuts ... Oh forget it ! I can not !

utterances.speaker: Dina
utterances.text: Joey , I am scared to death about this .

utterances.speaker: Dina
utterances.text: But I really think I can do it , I am just gonna need some help .

utterances.speaker: Dina
utterances.text: And Bobby gonna be here the whole time .

utterances.speaker: Bobby
utterances.text: You bet I am ! And to answer your earlier question , we are straight ... up gangster rap .

utterances.speaker: Dina
utterances.text: Look , Rachel told me how much easier you have made all this on her . Why can not you do that for me ?

emotion_cause.span: 8_Rachel told me how much easier you have made all this on her . Why can not you do that for me ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Because ! Cause ... Cause you are my baby sister !

utterances.speaker: Dina
utterances.text: And you are my big brother !

emotion_cause.span: 8_Rachel told me how much easier you have made all this on her . Why can not you do that for me ?

utterances.speaker: Dina
utterances.text: I mean , you are my favorite guy in the whole world .

utterances.speaker: Dina
utterances.text: I am not even scared to tell mom and dad .

utterances.speaker: Dina
utterances.text: I was scared of telling you .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Well I would be scared of them , but all right .

utterances.speaker: Dina
utterances.text: Joey , I can not stand the thought of having this baby with you mad at me .

emotion_cause.span: 15_I can not stand the thought of having this baby with you mad at me .

utterances.speaker: Dina
utterances.text: I want him to have his uncle .

emotion_cause.span: 15_I can not stand the thought of having this baby with you mad at me .

utterances.speaker: Dina
utterances.text: Is my baby gonna have his Uncle Joey ?

emotion_cause.span: 15_I can not stand the thought of having this baby with you mad at me .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Of course he is gonna have his Uncle Joey !

emotion_cause.span: 17_Is my baby gonna have his Uncle Joey ?

utterances.speaker: Dina
utterances.text: We are gonna be all right . I mean , even if we are not married this baby is gonna be so loved . Not just by us .

emotion_cause.span: 19_We are gonna be all right . I mean , even if we are not married this baby is gonna be so loved . Not just by us .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: That is right ! By his uncle too !

utterances.speaker: Bobby
utterances.text: And by you .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Okay Bobby , why do not we just come over here and let them have a little moment .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Come here !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: No ! Seriously ! What wrong with you ? !
